Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to be followed by Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Average time until SW-Checklist Completed is performed after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the end of the case

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment, considering only variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-EIC Reject in rejected manuscript variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to transition to SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days in delayed checklist variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection) in accepted versus revised manuscripts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion when followed by Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission versus when it is not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Minimum elapsed time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Manuscript Export Succeeded in high-performance variants (performance < 100000 seconds)
Metric: the minimum of the function base < 100000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed in variants that proceed directly versus those with intermediate delay notifications
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) grouped by variant type
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to be succeeded by Plagiarism Originality Report Completed compared to the time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in multi-round revision cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Checklist Completed after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in cases that eventually lead to acceptance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants involving major revisions
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the first reminder activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days) when checklist completion is delayed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Awaiting Assignment to Batch in end-to-end accepted submission variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist in cases where rejection occurs before AE assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'
